ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of the survey (e.g., demographic, health) */,
  "sampling_strategy" TEXT /* Sampling method used (e.g., random, stratified) */,
  "survey_instrument" TEXT /* Tool or instrument used for data collection (e.g., questionnaire, administrative records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., demographic, health outcomes) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, administrative records) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the variable belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "variable_category" TEXT /* Category of the variable (e.g., demographic, health) */,
  "variable_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable (e.g., years, kg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the data point represents */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (e.g., a particular survey instrument or administrative record) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the respondent participated in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the respondent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the respondent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "consent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the respondent has given consent for their data to be used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who provided the response */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the response belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the response represents */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the change belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the change was made to */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the variable */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the variable */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the permission is for */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "permission_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_dictionaries" (
  "dictionary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data dictionary */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data dictionary belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the data dictionary is for */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "variable_format" TEXT /* Format of the variable (e.g., integer, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dictionary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sampling strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_versions_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_versions_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)
